name: Mochi with Sea Vegetable
recipeIngredient: 1 package Mochi (7 oz), cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mochi in a heated, lightly oiled skillet.
2. Cover and cook over low heat until they soften and begin to puff up.
3. Turn the mochi once to prevent burning.
4. Lightly brush both sides with soy sauce.
5. Cut nori sheets into half and then into 2-inch strips.
6. Wrap one strip of nori around the center of each mochi piece.
7. Serve.
